module.name: Jointtechs Connector
module.description: Read-only outbound connector for the Jointtechs hosted voice portal.
module.changelog: *0.2.2* Simplify pairing to pairing-code-first, auto-detect PBX public URL, default portal URL, and route signed portal actions through FreePBX ajax.php. *0.2.1* Read recent FreePBX CDR rows, map native CDR fields, send recording paths, and make CLI sync workers functional. *0.2.0* Add signed inbound read-only actions for portal-triggered heartbeat, sync, recording metadata refresh, and recording streaming. *0.1.2* Fix install/uninstall returns, use FreePBX module config storage, sanitize AJAX pairing errors, and render pairing results inline. *0.1.1* Implement real HTTPS pairing and move AJAX handlers into the main module class. *0.1.0* Initial read-only pairing, heartbeat, CDR sync, and recording metadata sync scaffold.
